'''''Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter'': Prima's Official Game Guide''' was a strategy book for [[Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter]] by [[Prima Games]]. It was released on [[March 19]], [[2002]].

The guide detailed coverage of both the [[Wikipedia:PlayStation 2|PlayStation 2]] and [[Wikipedia:Xbox|Xbox]] versions of the game. It contained a detailed walkthrough out the game. Also included were comprehensive level descriptions and combat tips for helping to beat the more difficult foes of the game.
